rationale: The cited paper appears in a single grouped citation supporting a general statement that recent methods can estimate screening-based consideration models. The citing study does not adopt the DOC formulation, estimators, or findings from Hauser et al. (2010), and its own model development is anchored in other references (especially Gilbride and Allenby) plus new extensions. This indicates a background literature mention rather than a distinct functional dependency on the cited work.
